title: DVD Storage CD Case Holder: Fanspack 160 Capacity CD Sleeves Black Disc Cases Binder for Car - Protective CD Hard Organizer Box - Large DVD Wallet for Movie/Music/Game & Portable CD Book
features: The special design of the dvd wallet: the material uses high-quality hard plastic. It is waterproof and wear-resistant, dustproof, not easy to deform. The inner page of this dvd holder is connected in series by a buckle, and the order of the internal page can be moved anytime, anywhere. Each slot has a latch to prevent the DVD from sliding out

Size and capacity: The size of this dvd folder is approximately: 31*5.5*28cm(12.2*2.16*11.02in). There are 20 inner pages, double-sided design, and can hold 160 CDs in total. Small size and large capacity, very portable. When you travel by car, it will not take up too much space in your car and will keep your CD in order, away from dust and scratches! Lightweight cd disk storage can help you save valuable space and ensure the safety of precious CD discs

Convenient storage: disk case is not only suitable for VCD, DVD and CD, but also can store video and Blu-ray movies, music, game discs. For movie lovers, games or DJs, dvd binder is a great gift! Now, you can let parents like to listen to old records, daughters who like to watch DVDs at home, sons who want to organize his video games and your DJ friends, bring the most elegant and convenient cd pouch. They can easily store and protect CDs, DVDs or games

Effective closing protection: The zipper can still be easily closed when 160 DVDs are inserted into this cd storage. The inner lining used to store the CD in this cd case is made of non-woven fabric, This material is very slender and has a soft texture. It is very suitable for storing CD and can prevent CD from being scratched

Quality Assurance: If you are not satisfied with the purchase, please feel free to contact us. We will try our best to serve you. For any quality problems or defective items, we will solve the problem for you within 24 hours
description: Product Description Smooth double-row zipper The zipper is made of high-quality metal, which is smooth and will not get stuck Tight sewing process Tight wiring is also the key to ensure that the CD box is waterproof and dustproof Robust housing The high-quality shell can prevent the penetration of moisture and protect the CD/DVD from moisture invasion Arrange CDs in a reasonable order Quickly find the CD you need Reduce life troubles Freely detachable CD sleeve Are you still worrying about rearranging all the CDs in order? Are you still worrying about inserting a new CD into a CD that has been arranged? Are you still worrying about taking out 4 CDs or 8 CDs without disturbing the order of other CDs? Play Time Put your beloved game CDs in a thick DVD storage in order. This is an expression of love for games and respect for games. Movie Time People who like to watch movies will also like to collect movie CDs/DVDs, a portable CD holder may be able to help you. In-car Entertainment For a long journey, you need to enjoy music or movies with friends in the car. There is not much space in the car, so a portable CD case is particularly important.
